scope: first-pass subset: Papers 22, 24, 31 + group3 synthesis (coverage of 22/24/31)
note: Seeds live ONLY in the worktree. Reviewers are blind and pointed at the worktree. This key lives in the MAIN repo so reviewers cannot see it.

seeds.planted: Comm. Pure Appl. Math. vol 19, p211 (1967)
seeds.truth: Comm. Pure Appl. Math. vol 14, p187 (1961)

seeds.planted: expected_arr built from sorted(spectrum) itself -> assert spectrum==sorted(spectrum); always passes, does NOT verify the N+3/2 HO spectrum it claims to
seeds.truth: original built expected independently from Fraction(2N+3,2) with degeneracies

seeds.planted: 'verification across every central potential and all l_max<=64 ... exact identity at arbitrary scale'
seeds.truth: verified across 5 named potentials, l_max 1-5; it is a bound, not an exact identity at arbitrary scale

seeds.planted: 'The fine-structure constant is derived in Paper 2 as K = pi(B+F-Delta)=alpha^-1'
seeds.truth: K is an Observation (never derived); the very next sentence still calls it a numerical observation without first-principles derivation

seeds.planted: 'The same universal/Coulomb partition has now been established for non-central, multi-center (molecular) interactions as well ... extends without caveat to arbitrary molecular geometry'
seeds.truth: Paper 31 explicitly states the non-central partition is NOT yet established

deterministic_dimension.calibration_basis: check_k_label caught 12 real K-label defects this run (real dirt -> fixed); check_internal_titles + check_paper_test_refs ran clean (no dirt present) and carry their own regression tests (test_internal_title_consistency.py, test_paper_test_refs.py) plus caught real drift in the v4.15.0 audit. Deterministic discrimination is thus demonstrated this run without a planted S7.

controls.status: CORRECT (MEASURED) - must NOT be flagged material

controls.claim: Bargmann-Segal graph pi-free bit-exact in exact rational arithmetic at N_max=5
controls.status: CORRECT (backed by test_pi_free_larger) - must NOT be flagged

controls.claim: A/D partition: universal (algebra-only) vs potential-specific (Dirac) sectors

controls.status: CORRECT attribution - citation-reviewer must NOT flag

controls.claim: K = pi(B+F-Delta) 'remains a numerical observation without first-principles derivation' (~line 1262)
controls.status: CORRECT (Observation tier) - claims-reviewer must NOT flag the correct label
